question: Which year from 2011-2015 has the lowest number of births to unmarried females ages 15-19 in the United States? Your response should be in the format [Answer].
practical_motivation: A demographic analyst wants the lowest annual count of unmarried teen births in the early 2010s.

1.fact: Filtering to Age Group = "15-19 years" for 2011-2015, the minimum Number of Births is 204043 in 2015.
1.subquestion: Which year from 2011-2015 has the lowest number of births to unmarried females ages 15-19 in the United States? (Filter Age Group == "15-19 years"; select the minimum Number of Births.)

reasoning_chain: Node 1: Which year from 2011-2015 has the lowest number of births to unmarried females ages 15-19? (Filter Age Group == "15-19 years"; select the minimum Number of Births.) The answer is 2015.
